title: Per Player Starter Bundle/Shulker
description:
Ever needed a simple starter kit for you & your friends?

Each player will get a Bundle/Shulker Box of goodies on world join.
body:
# Summary

Ever needed a simple starter kit for you & your friends?

Each player will get a Bundle/Shulker Box of goodies on world join.

## Bundle/ShulkerBox Contents [V1.4 & Above]

- Stone Sword
- Stone Pickaxe
- Stone Axe
- White Bed
- 16 Golden Carrots
- Leather Helmet
- Leather Chestplate
- Leather Leggings
- Leather Boots

## ShulkerBox Contents [V1.3 & Below]

- Iron Sword
- Chainmail Helmet
- Stone Pickaxe
- Compass
- Chainmail Chestplate
- 16 Golden Carrots
- Chainmail Leggings
- Clock
- Stone Axe
- Chainmail Boots
- Bed
